creator: steve@megahack.com
text:
Script started on Sat Apr 15 12:29:43 2000
catbert# pwd
/usr/ports/x11/XFree86-4
catbert# make

Assuming that you have fetched a USA-Legal Wraphelp.c.
===>  Extracting for XFree86-4.0

Fix: 

Workaround: 

cd /usr/ports/x11/XFree86-4/work
ln -s XFree86-4.0 xc
cd ..
make
How-To-Repeat: 
cd /usr/ports/x11/XFree86-4
make fetch
make
